title: tanacetum × sinense
intro: Tanacetum × sinense, also known as Tansy or Tanacetum, is a perennial herb native to Asia, resulting from the cross between Tanacetum vulgare and Tanacetum coccineum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tanacetum × sinense include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Tanacetum × sinense can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and infusions, although it is essential to use it in moderation due to its potential toxicity.
